scope: Stable scenario-reference node, live rename-safe rendering, semantic automation marker, immutable checkpoint reference retention, and toolbar insertion contract.
commands: node scripts/run-with-heartbeat.mjs --timeout-seconds 180 --heartbeat-seconds 15 -- npm --prefix frontend exec -- vitest run src/workspace/nodes/ScenarioReferenceNode.test.tsx src/workspace/editorAutomation.test.ts src/workspace/versionAutomation.test.ts src/workspace/versionRestoreIntegration.test.ts --reporter=verbose
node scripts/run-with-heartbeat.mjs --timeout-seconds 240 --heartbeat-seconds 15 -- npm --prefix frontend run build

results.headless: Scenario node, semantic automation, version automation, and two-peer restore suites pass.
results.productionBuild: TypeScript and Vite production build pass.
results.identity: Serialized node contains scenarioId and no title snapshot.
results.rename: The same ID resolves the updated title without editor-state mutation.
results.collaboration: Two Yjs-bound editors converge on the same scenario ID.
results.automation: The [scenario:<stable-id>] marker reconstructs a semantic node and reports a unique ID set.
results.versions: Save and restore carry the immutable scenarioIds set.

limitations: Packaged pointer insertion has not yet been interaction-verified.
P-06 spotlight/embed behavior is not implemented.
The physical two-install LAN/Drive gate is still blocked because office-secondary is not registered with the coordinator.
